title: Learning Hebrew (A Gothsploitation Movie)
overview: When criticism of faith is outlawed by the Politically Correct Militia, Bella and her group of idealistic cyberpunks take Darwinism to the door steps of London. But with agnostic thugs fighting in the street and atheist terrorists attacking the liberal establishment, Bella and her friends are driven underground into a dark existence where the future and past collide, allegiances are strained and old scores must be settled.
